name: citoyen-peyi
description: Application de vote anonyme — Citoyen Peyi

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix app/backend && bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter pub get'
scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:frontend: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter run -d web-server --web-hostname 0.0.0.0 --web-port=8081 --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:4000} --dart-define=FIREBASE_API_KEY=${FIREBASE_API_KEY:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_APP_ID=${FIREBASE_APP_ID:-} --dart-define=PUSH_VAPID_KEY=${PUSH_VAPID_KEY:-}'
scripts.build: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; case "${API_BASE_URL:-}" in https://*) ;; *) echo "API_BASE_URL HTTPS requis pour un build production" >&2; exit 1;; esac; cd flutter_app && flutter build web --release --pwa-strategy=none --base-href /citoyen-peyi/ --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=$API_BASE_URL --dart-define=FIREBASE_API_KEY=${FIREBASE_API_KEY:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_APP_ID=${FIREBASE_APP_ID:-} --dart-define=PUSH_VAPID_KEY=${PUSH_VAPID_KEY:-}'
scripts.test:flutter: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter test'
scripts.lint: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"; cd flutter_app && flutter analyze'
scripts.publish:app: bash -lc 'cd /workspaces/citoyen-peyi && export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH" && COMMIT_MESSAGE=${COMMIT_MESSAGE:-feat: notify commune citizens on new polls} && API_BASE_URL=${API_BASE_URL:-https://citoyen-peyi-backend-up6de3cljq-ew.a.run.app} && case "${API_BASE_URL:-}" in https://*) ;; *) echo "API_BASE_URL HTTPS requis pour un build production" >&2; exit 1;; esac && git status --short && git add -A && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m "$COMMIT_MESSAGE" --allow-empty && cd flutter_app && flutter analyze && flutter build web --release --pwa-strategy=none --base-href / --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=$API_BASE_URL --dart-define=FIREBASE_API_KEY=${FIREBASE_API_KEY:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-} --dart-define=FIREBASE_APP_ID=${FIREBASE_APP_ID:-} --dart-define=PUSH_VAPID_KEY=${PUSH_VAPID_KEY:-} && cd /workspaces/citoyen-peyi && if grep -q http://localhost:4000 flutter_app/build/web/main.dart.js; then echo BUILD_CONTAINS_LOCALHOST_REFUS_DEPLOY >&2; exit 1; fi && npx --yes firebase-tools@13 deploy --config firebase.ghpages.json --only hosting --project citoyen-peyi && git push origin main'
